description: Coulson and the dying Gordon are imprisoned together in Afterlife. Gordon is determined to save the imprisoned Inhumans and, with the last of his energy, helps Coulson escape. This moment is both suspenseful and bittersweet as Gordon sacrifices himself for the S.H.I.E.L.D. cause.

transcript.line: You let me worry about that.
This room was built to hold powerful Inhumans.
Yeah? And I'm about to bust us out of here. Watch. It's gonna be super-satisfying.
You can't get us out. But maybe I can.
Save your energy. You're too weak.
The other Inhumans... I can't let this happen to them.
Gordon, wait! It's okay. You're gonna be alright.
